checks.finding: Every AC-NNN cited in tasks.md resolves to a matching row in acceptance-tests.md (AC-001..AC-016). No dangling AC identifiers.
All 6 tasks use valid Blockers: T-001 'T-002'; T-002..T-006 'None'. Matches blockers_format_valid:true.
REQ-001..REQ-006 each appear in exactly one task Requirements field (REQ-001->T-001 ... REQ-006->T-006). No uncovered requirement.
AC-001..AC-016 each map to exactly one task via Done When and traceability.md Acceptance Mapping. No uncovered AC.
Every task declares a Requirements field naming a real REQ-NNN. No orphan tasks.
No task title contains test/spec/verify and no task's Planned Files are exclusively test-file changes; no test-only task requiring an AC reference.
All 6 tasks show Approval: Draft and Status: Planned, matching the round-1/attempt-1 state.
Every Risk/Required Workflow pairing matches the matrix (high/critical->tdd): T-001/T-002 critical/tdd; T-003..T-006 high/tdd. Consistent with workflow_match_precheck:PASS.
traceability.md Acceptance Mapping shows a strict one-to-one AC-to-Task mapping; no AC claimed by more than one task.
T-001's sole task-ID blocker T-002 exists in dependency-graph.json nodes; no dangling references.
BLOCKERS-FORMAT is PASS so this ran. Single edge T-001->T-002; T-002 has no outgoing edges. No cycle.

'and' in titles/scopes connects facets of one requirement (T-001 R-10 port facets; T-002 same bug in .py/.js for parity; T-005 two mitigations of the same REQ-005/B2 boundary on one file, single issue #114). No task combines unrelated concerns.

Every Done When item names a concrete TEST-NNN result, an exact file/section change, or a named evidence artifact; no forbidden vague verbs. Non-doc tasks name a concrete TEST target; doc-only T-004 names ship/SKILL.md content plus a document-conformance artifact.

Every task T-001..T-006 has a traceability.md Task Mapping entry; every REQ in traceability.md exists in requirements.md; full-profile layer anchors verified against actual headings; no dangling anchors or misused N/A.
